mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT candidate.sgg_cd, candidate.sgg_nm, candidate.umd_cd, candidate.umd_nm, candidate.display_name, candidate.sort_order FROM ( SELECT s.sgg_cd, s.sgg_nm, NULL AS umd_cd, '' AS umd_nm, s.sgg_nm AS display_name, 0 AS sort_order FROM ( SELECT r.sgg_cd, MIN(r.sgg_nm) AS sgg_nm FROM region r GROUP BY r.sgg_cd ) s WHERE REPLACE(s.sgg_nm, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE(, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE( CASE WHEN RIGHT(s.sgg_nm, 1) IN ('군', '구') THEN LEFT(s.sgg_nm, CHAR_LENGTH(s.sgg_nm) - 1) ELSE s.sgg_nm END, ' ', '' ) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\'
UNION ALL
SELECT r.sgg_cd, r.sgg_nm, r.umd_cd, r.umd_nm, CONCAT(r.sgg_nm, ' ', r.umd_nm) AS display_name, 1 AS sort_order FROM region r WHERE REPLACE(CONCAT(r.sgg_nm, r.umd_nm), ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE( CONCAT( , r.umd_nm ), ' ', '' ) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE( CONCAT( CASE WHEN RIGHT(r.sgg_nm, 1) IN ('군', '구') THEN LEFT(r.sgg_nm, CHAR_LENGTH(r.sgg_nm) - 1) ELSE r.sgg_nm END, r.umd_nm ), ' ', '' ) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE(r.sgg_nm, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' OR REPLACE(r.umd_nm, ' ', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\\' ) candidate ORDER BY candidate.sort_order ASC, candidate.sgg_cd ASC, candidate.umd_nm ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT fr.sgg_cd, COALESCE(r.sgg_nm, rs.sgg_nm) AS sgg_nm, CASE WHEN fr.umd_nm = '' THEN NULL ELSE r.umd_cd END AS umd_cd, fr.umd_nm, CASE WHEN fr.umd_nm = '' THEN rs.sgg_nm ELSE CONCAT_WS(' ', r.sgg_nm, NULLIF(r.umd_nm, '')) END AS display_name, ( SELECT latest_sale_deal.deal_amount FROM ( SELECT sd.deal_amount, sd.deal_date, sd.id FROM sale_deal sd JOIN property p ON p.id = sd.property_id WHERE fr.umd_nm = '' AND p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd
UNION ALL
SELECT sd.deal_amount, sd.deal_date, sd.id FROM sale_deal sd JOIN property p ON p.id = sd.property_id WHERE fr.umd_nm <> '' AND p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm ) latest_sale_deal ORDER BY latest_sale_deal.deal_date DESC, latest_sale_deal.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_sale_price, ( SELECT latest_jeonse_deal.deposit FROM ( SELECT rd.deposit, rd.deal_date, rd.id FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE fr.umd_nm = '' AND p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND rd.monthly_rent = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT rd.deposit, rd.deal_date, rd.id FROM rent_deal rd JOIN property p ON p.id = rd.property_id WHERE fr.umd_nm <> '' AND p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm AND rd.monthly_rent = 0 ) latest_jeonse_deal ORDER BY latest_jeonse_deal.deal_date DESC, latest_jeonse_deal.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_jeonse_deposit, latest_monthly_rent_deal.deposit AS latest_monthly_rent_deposit, latest_monthly_rent_deal.monthly_rent AS latest_monthly_rent, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT sd.id FROM sale_deal sd JOIN property p ON p.id = sd.property_id WHERE fr.umd_nm = '' AND p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND sd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo}
UNION ALL
SELECT sd.id FROM sale_deal sd JOIN property p ON p.id = sd.property_id WHERE fr.umd_nm <> '' AND p.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm AND sd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) sale_deals ) AS sale_deal_count, COALESCE(rent_deal_counts.jeonse_deal_count, 0) AS jeonse_deal_count, COALESCE(rent_deal_counts.monthly_rent_deal_count, 0) AS monthly_rent_deal_count FROM favorite_region fr LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sgg_cd, MIN(sgg_nm) AS sgg_nm FROM region GROUP BY sgg_cd ) rs ON rs.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd LEFT JOIN region r ON r.sgg_cd = fr.sgg_cd AND r.umd_nm = fr.umd_nm LEFT JOIN ( SELECT favorite_region_id, deposit, monthly_rent FROM ( SELECT latest_monthly_rent_candidates.favorite_region_id, latest_monthly_rent_candidates.deposit, latest_monthly_rent_candidates.monthly_rent, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY latest_monthly_rent_candidates.favorite_region_id ORDER BY latest_monthly_rent_candidates.deal_date DESC, latest_monthly_rent_candidates.id DESC ) AS rn FROM ( SELECT fr_inner.id AS favorite_region_id, rd.deposit, rd.monthly_rent, rd.deal_date, rd.id FROM favorite_region fr_inner JOIN property p ON p.sgg_cd = fr_inner.sgg_cd JOIN rent_deal rd ON rd.property_id = p.id WHERE fr_inner.user_id = #{userId} AND fr_inner.umd_nm = '' AND rd.monthly_rent > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT fr_inner.id AS favorite_region_id, rd.deposit, rd.monthly_rent, rd.deal_date, rd.id FROM favorite_region fr_inner JOIN property p ON p.sgg_cd = fr_inner.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr_inner.umd_nm JOIN rent_deal rd ON rd.property_id = p.id WHERE fr_inner.user_id = #{userId} AND fr_inner.umd_nm <> '' AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 ) latest_monthly_rent_candidates ) latest_monthly_rent_ranked WHERE rn = 1 ) latest_monthly_rent_deal ON latest_monthly_rent_deal.favorite_region_id = fr.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT favorite_region_id, SUM(CASE WHEN monthly_rent = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS jeonse_deal_count, SUM(CASE WHEN monthly_rent > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS monthly_rent_deal_count FROM ( SELECT fr_inner.id AS favorite_region_id, rd.monthly_rent FROM favorite_region fr_inner JOIN property p ON p.sgg_cd = fr_inner.sgg_cd JOIN rent_deal rd ON rd.property_id = p.id WHERE fr_inner.user_id = #{userId} AND fr_inner.umd_nm = '' AND rd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo}
UNION ALL
SELECT fr_inner.id AS favorite_region_id, rd.monthly_rent FROM favorite_region fr_inner JOIN property p ON p.sgg_cd = fr_inner.sgg_cd AND p.umd_nm = fr_inner.umd_nm JOIN rent_deal rd ON rd.property_id = p.id WHERE fr_inner.user_id = #{userId} AND fr_inner.umd_nm <> '' AND rd.deal_date >= #{oneYearAgo} ) rent_deal_count_targets GROUP BY favorite_region_id ) rent_deal_counts ON rent_deal_counts.favorite_region_id = fr.id WHERE fr.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fr.created_at DESC, fr.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_region (user_id, sgg_cd, umd_nm) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sggCd}, #{umdNm})
